message:
feat(mission): add shadow-mode evaluator for recommendation-vs-execution diff (ft-1i2ge.6.3)

Non-invasive evaluator that compares planner AssignmentSet recommendations
against actual MissionEvent dispatch/rejection events each cycle. Tracks
dispatch rate, agent match rate, fidelity score, safety/conflict events,
and score accuracy with Welford-style incremental aggregate metrics.

22 unit tests covering: perfect match, missing/unexpected executions,
agent divergence, score accuracy, safety/conflict counting, history
eviction, warmup detection, low-fidelity streak tracking, serde roundtrip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
